arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton both agree over 'difficult' Newcastle v Brighton result prediction
arts.sum: Newcastle United will return to Premier League action after the international break with a difficult fixture against Brighton & Hove Albion on Saturday. The Magpies...

arts.ttl: Italian journalist “would bet” £55m Newcastle star joins AC Milan
arts.sum: Italian journalist Carlo Pellegatti believes Newcastle star Sandro Tonali will return to AC Milan in the future but admits he doesn’t know when that will be. The 24-year-old completed a move from the Serie A giants last summer as part of a £55m deal but his time in England has not gone according to plan. […] The post Italian journalist “would bet” £55m Newcastle star joins AC Milan appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs Brighton prediction made as Alan Shearer offers 'high line' verdict
arts.sum: "If reports are to be true, that Newcastle have at least one of Callum Wilson or Aleksandar Isak back, then the chances they create combined with the way Brighton play with a high-line, means I will predict a home win at St James' Park." United have Alexander Isak available, something which Newcastle goalscoring hero Alan Shearer feels will be vital, but are without Kieran Trippier, while Callum Wilson looks set to again miss out.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Brighton with Isak back and Gordon dilemma
arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Brighton: Pope; Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall; Tonali, Guimaraes, Joelinton; Barnes, Gordon, Isak. It might be less about which players Eddie Howe picks to start Newcastle United's Premier League game with Brighton and Hove Albion this weekend, and more about how they line up.

arts.ttl: Callum Wilson call creeps closer as Newcastle United plot January transfer moves
arts.sum: As the January window fast approaches, the call Newcastle chiefs need to make over his future edges closer - and the next few months will dictate whether Wilson remains at the club for the second half of the 2024/25 campaign. Newcastle United striker Callum Wilson is on his way back to full fitness but the Geordie faithful will have to wait a tad longer to see the club's No 9 in action once again.

arts.ttl: Forest owner gets stadium ban after Fulham tunnel incident. Nuno touchline ban for Brighton red card
arts.sum: Forest manager Nuno Espirito Santo was given a separate punishment on Friday when fined 55,000 pounds ($72,000) and banned from the touchline for two games after being sent off in his team’s 2-2 draw with Brighton last month. The owner of Nottingham Forest was given a five-match stadium ban on Friday in the latest of a series of sanctions against the Premier League club in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: 'It hurt': Howe admits transfer regrets as Newcastle prepare to face former wonderkid
arts.sum: The Newcastle boss admitted having to cash in on Minteh and academy graduate Elliot Anderson ‘hurt’ but insisted the decision was ‘the right thing’ for the club and its finances. Newcastle will host Brighton this weekend knowing that wonderkid Yankuba Minteh will be playing for the visitors instead of his first appearance at St James’ Park coming while wearing black and white.

arts.ttl: Ashworth plan and records broken as Yankuba Minteh makes second Newcastle visit
arts.sum: Despite an abundance of multi-million pound talent on display, all eyes will be on 20-year-old Yankuba Minteh when Newcastle United return to Premier League action this weekend. The rest is history as Newcastle, backed into a corner by the Premier League's controversial profit and sustainability rules [PSR], sold up ahead of time for £33m, subsequently making £26m profit on a player who hadn't kicked a football in black and white.

arts.ttl: England have to do what is right for them - Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe says he was not contacted by the Football Association during their recent hunt for a new England manager.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe: I was not approached by the FA about the England job
arts.sum: Howe had been linked with the vacancy before Thomas Tuchel’s appointment was confirmed on Wednesday.
